campaign: C3 — Liveness Everywhere a Decision Is Made

phases.title: claim_state enum + deriveClaimState + read-surface threading
phases.outcome: CLAIM_STATES (unclaimed|live|stale|yours) + deriveClaimState (pure, identity-masked, self-stale→yours, fail-safe-to-live) + readLeasesFor (batched, no N+1) threaded through task/epic/proposal list+get+awareness + route OpenAPI (camelCase claimState). claim_status kept (additive). full 10/10, server 1314, shared 435.

phases.title: MCP renders surface claim_state (identity-masked)
phases.outcome: claimState? added to hand-written MCP client types; claimStateLabel helper; wired into pm_list_tasks/get_task/list_epics/get_epic/get_my_work/awareness_check (enum-only, identity-masked, no relative-time since P1 exposed no timestamp). mcp 132, full 10/10.

phases.title: pick-next skips live / reclaim-then-claim stale + awareness live-vs-stale
phases.outcome: Two-phase pickNextTask: Phase A (unassigned, all modes, unchanged) then Phase B (mode=on only: skip live, reclaim-then-claim stale via reclaimOne, barely-stale margin LEASE_PICK_MARGIN_MS_DEFAULT=60s, dual atomic guards). Overrides on a separate internal 3rd arg (unreachable from wire). resolveActiveLeaseMode export. Awareness no-change (P1/P2). server 1321, full 10/10. Default-shadow = zero behavior change.

phases.title: web badges for claim_state (board/roadmap/epic)
phases.outcome: ClaimStateBadge (stale=amber+icon, live=subtle, yours=accent, unclaimed=null) + getClaimStateStyle; regenerated web api-types; wired into board/epic-list/epic-detail AND roadmap canvas (epic-node) — EXPANDED scope (commander): threaded claimState through EpicGraphNode (server epic-graph.service/schema, ~2 lines, data already supplied by epicService.list) so the headline roadmap survey shows stale epics. TaskGraphNode mini-DAG PARKED. full 10/10, typecheck 6/6, lint 0, build 5/5.

notes: camelCase claimState (route/views/API/MCP) vs snake claim_state (shared select schemas/derived types only) — the shared select schemas are NOT imported in server/src. P3 changes pick-next BEHAVIOR (P1/P2 only add the read field).
